description: Story matching — proves a second source article about the same transfer is matched to the existing story, not spawned as a new one.
decision: DECISIONS.md 2026-04-29 — Slice 2 schema and two-stage matching

new_article.title: Beşiktaş, Rashica transferini KAP'a bildirdi
new_article.summary: Beşiktaş Kulübü, Milot Rashica'nın transferini resmi olarak açıkladı.

input.mock_claude_judge_response: {"match":"story-uuid-001","contribution_type":"confirming","confidence_delta":20,"reason":"Same player (Milot Rashica) and destination club (Beşiktaş) as story-uuid-001"}

what_this_test_proves: Stage 1 entity fingerprint correctly identifies story-uuid-001 as candidate (shared player Milot Rashica)
Stage 1 correctly excludes story-uuid-002 (different player, no overlap)
Stage 2 judge returns correct match ID
State transitions from emerging to developing at confidence >= 40
